metadata.title: Smart Wallet Savings | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Smart Wallet is a digital wallet that enables banked and unbanked population of the country to open accounts without the hassle of paperwork. Open Smart Wallet through simple biometric verification and enhance your savings by earning Halal monthly returns on savings, with the flexibility to use the money at any time.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Open Smart Wallet in no time and earn halal profit on your savings! Smart Wallet is a digital wallet that enables banked and unbanked population of the country to open accounts without the hassle of paperwork. Open Smart Wallet through simple biometric verification and enhance your savings by earning Halal monthly returns on savings, with the flexibility to use the money at any time. Requirements for Using Meezan Smart Wallet - Savings Smart Wallet can be opened in PKR Only customers having a valid CNIC can open this account Smart Wallet can only be opened after successful verification Pay Pak Debit Cards issued upon request on can only be used locally (Charges Apply) Key Features Instant account opening Instant account opening ATM access Nationwide ATM access through PayPak Debit card (If applied for) Biometric scanning Cash withdrawal from any Meezan branch after biometric verification Deposit No requirement of minimum deposit Internet and Online Banking Free internet and mobile banking services Profit will be paid on monthly basis and calculated on daily basis Terms & Conditions Key Fact Statements (KFS) How Wallet - Savings Works? Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Smart Wallet Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized for Shariah compliant investment or to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Meezan Smart Wallet Monthly 0.46 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Amount Profit Smart Wallet Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Open a Wallet - Savings Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in opening your account. Locate a Branch MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing!
